author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
The Bubble Dreamer
The Bubble Dreamer - the very reason for the existence of the Glade of Dreams.

What nightmares could he be having this time?

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
Hubs are now playable!
Hunt for secrets and prance around the Teensies you just liberated in the Old Teensie Kingdom hub.
